economic_notes: First Nation has investments in MERE General Partner Inc. (economic development), HIAH Economic Dev LP (hospitality/gaming), U.C.C.M. Building Material Supply Limited Partnership (14.28%), M'Nidoo M'Nising Limited Partnership (16.55%), Robinson Huron Forestry Inc. (12.5%), Great Lakes Hospitality Group Partnership (29.44%), and She'ndwin Teg Gaming Commission.
notes: Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: MERE General Partner Inc. (100% owned, net assets $3,110,467, net earnings $663,925) and HIAH Economic Dev LP (99.99% interest, net assets $4,217,840, net loss $11,381). Advances to MERE of $3,799,608 are unsecured and non-interest bearing. Loan receivable from MERE of $478,295 bears interest at 6% per annum. Restricted cash of $1,665,419 held per CMHC operating agreements plus $115,010 for endowed education fund. Deferred revenue increased significantly from $10,803,424 to $21,177,515. expenses_health combines Health Services ($1,582,442) + Health Agreement ($1,344,784) + Mental Health ($2,085,232) = $5,012,458; however split shown above uses Health Services + Health Agreement only for expenses_health; expenses_housing combines Rentals ($292,173) + Subsidized Housing ($1,050,565). Schedules of program activities include 15 schedules but detailed breakdowns not fully visible in provided pages.
